test_cases.description: Verifies correct Next.js App Router sitemap.ts with hreflang alternates for IT/EN/CZ locales
test_cases.input: Create a sitemap.ts for my Next.js multilingual site with IT, EN, and CZ locales. Include static pages and blog posts from Payload CMS.

test_cases.description: Verifies correct XSL stylesheet and custom route handler for human-readable sitemap
test_cases.input: How do I add XSL styling to my sitemap so it looks nice in the browser?

test_cases.description: Verifies correct priority values are assigned per page type
test_cases.input: What priority values should I use for different page types in my sitemap?
